Defines codepoint constants and functions to check codepoint properties for text rendering.

# Purpose
This C header file defines a set of constants and function prototypes related to Unicode codepoints. It includes type definitions and macros for specific Unicode characters, such as `EM_DASH`, `EN_DASH`, and several codepoint values like `ELLIPSIS_CODEPOINT` and `HYPHEN_CODEPOINT`. The file declares several functions that check properties of a `Codepoint`, such as [`codepoint_is_formatting_indicator`](<#codepoint_is_formatting_indicator>), [`codepoint_is_skin_tone_modifier`](<#codepoint_is_skin_tone_modifier>), and [`codepoint_is_emoji`](<#codepoint_is_emoji>). These functions are used to determine specific characteristics of codepoints, such as whether they are formatting indicators, skin tone modifiers, or special characters. The file also includes a comment indicating a workaround for special rendering of certain codepoints.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdint.h`
- `stdbool.h`
